item.title: Putin Can No Longer Hide His Catastrophe
item.description: The Russian dictator has lost control of the narrative.
item.dc:creator: Phillips Payson O’Brien

item.title: The Absurd Misunderstanding Fueling the Debate OverThe Odyssey
item.description: Elon Musk’s outrage at Christopher Nolan says more about today’s myopic notion of identity than it does about classical antiquity.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Chatterton Williams

item.title: Barney Frank Was Like No One Else
item.description: He was the smartest man in the room, a rare attribute for a member of modern-day Congress.
item.dc:creator: Robert G. Kaiser

item.title: College Should Be Way More Fun
item.description: I’m not talking about keg stands. I’m talking about the joyous mysteries of intellectual life.
item.dc:creator: Michael A. Elliott

item.title: Why College Students Are Booing AI
item.description: The sound of a cosmic howl
item.dc:creator: Ian Bogost

item.title: Israel’s Human Wrecking Ball
item.description: And the prime minister who empowers him
item.dc:creator: Avi Issacharoff

item.title: What the Trump Administration Needs to Do to Contain the Ebola Outbreak
item.description: We’re already playing from behind, but it’s not too late to limit the damage.
item.dc:creator: Stephanie Psaki

item.title: The Economic Experiment That Upended Reality
item.description: Minimum-wage increases were expected to kill jobs. The fact that they didn’t should make us rethink a lot of assumptions.
item.dc:creator: Nick Hanauer

item.title: A Close Reading of Trump’s Statement on Attending His Son’s Wedding
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Chait

item.title: A Department of Justice for an Age of Conspiracy Theories
item.description: DOJ is now very much an active participant in the online discourse that promotes and perpetuates ideas that are barely connected to reality.
item.dc:creator: Quinta Jurecic
